- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Next.js App Router site with TypeScript, multilingual marketing content, compliant EB-5 educational copy, strong SEO, and a contact/question intake flow.
- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Manual Next.js project setup was used because `create-next-app` rejected the workspace folder name due to uppercase letters.
- [x] Customize the Project
  Added localized EB-5 landing pages, structured content sections, compliant disclaimers, and an intake form with server-side handling.
- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No required extensions were provided by the setup tool.
- [x] Compile the Project
  `npm install`, `npm run build`, and `npm run lint` completed successfully.
- [x] Create and Run Task
  Added and started a VS Code task for `npm run dev`.
- [x] Launch the Project
  Local development server can be started with the VS Code task or `npm run dev`.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  `README.md` is present and current, and this file has been cleaned up to remove template comments.
